title: Explicit Agent State Machine, Progress, Budgets, Termination, and Cancellation · Program Forensics
summary: A preserved agent trajectory contains one plausible model, schema, tool, authority, state, loop, memory, concurrency, injection, evaluation, telemetry, deployment, or recovery defect; locate the first failed invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in bounded observable Python agent loop and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence de…
objectives: Represent observe, request, classify, authorize, approve, execute, record, continue, complete, refuse, fail, cancel, and escalate transitions explicitly.
Enforce steps, wall time, tokens, model calls, tool calls, retries, bytes, concurrency, and spend before each transition.
Define observable state change and detect repeated calls, unchanged errors, oscillation, cyclic plans, and declining evidence quality.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Cooperative Cancellation
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-cooperative-cancellation-1vqqhd" that uses case 2704 to implement an explicit agent state machine with progress, budgets, repeated-call detection, cancellation, and one terminal reason. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Safe AI agents and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Cooperative Cancellation.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Cooperative Cancellation into observable performance evidence. For Safe AI agents and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Cooperative Cancellation, keep Cooperative Cancellation connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-cooperative-cancellation-1vqqhd
# Competency: agentpy-cooperative-cancellation.
# Case 2704: an accessible public-service intake assistant.
# Operating constraint: every external effect requires explicit least-authority policy.
# Changed case: change model capability, API version, schema, or provider state and revalidate the adapter.
def evidence_agentpy_cooperative_cancellation_1vqqhd(step_budget: int = 12, used_steps: int = 7, repeated_call_limit: int = 2, repeated_calls: int = 1, terminal_events: int = 1) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1vqqhd = "1vqqhd-dhqqv1-2704"
    assert evidence_variant_1vqqhd
    evidence_axes_1vqqhd = (
        "authority1vqqhd",
        "interaction2704",
        "tooldhqqv1",
        "state1vqqhd2704",
        "evaluation27041vqqhd",
        "recoverydhqqv12704",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1vqqhd)) == 6
    if step_budget < 1 or used_steps < 0 or used_steps > step_budget:
        return False, used_steps, "step-budget"
    if repeated_calls < 0 or repeated_calls > repeated_call_limit:
        return False, repeated_calls, "loop-stall"
    if terminal_events != 1:
        return False, terminal_events, "terminal-ambiguity"
    if used_steps < 1:
        return False, used_steps, "no-progress"
    assert used_steps <= step_budget and terminal_events == 1
    return True, used_steps, "bounded-agent-loop"
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.
